CreatedBy: RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c systemctl enable lab-install.service # buildkit
RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c chmod +x /opt/purple-team/scripts/install-all.sh # buildkit
RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c chmod +x /opt/purple-team/scripts/install-falco.sh # buildkit
RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c chmod +x /opt/purple-team/scripts/install-wazuh.sh # buildkit
RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh # buildkit
RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c chmod +x /opt/purple-team/scripts/setup-workstation.sh # buildkit

RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c rpm --import https://falco.org/repo/falcosecurity-packages.asc &&     printf '[falco]
name=Falco repository
baseurl=https://download.falco.org/packages/rpm
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=https://falco.org/repo/falcosecurity-packages.asc
enabled=1
'     > /etc/yum.repos.d/falco.repo &&     dnf install -y falco &&     dnf clean all # buildkit

RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c rpm --import https://packages.wazuh.com/key/GPG-KEY-WAZUH &&     printf '[wazuh]
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=https://packages.wazuh.com/key/GPG-KEY-WAZUH
enabled=1
name=EL-$releasever - Wazuh
baseurl=https://packages.wazuh.com/4.x/yum/
priority=1
'     > /etc/yum.repos.d/wazuh.repo &&     dnf install -y wazuh-agent-4.12.0 &&     dnf clean all &&     killall wazuh-execd wazuh-agentd wazuh-syscheckd wazuh-logcollector wazuh-modulesd 2>/dev/null || true &&     rm -f /var/ossec/var/run/*.pid # buildkit
RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c mkdir -p /etc/falco/config.d # buildkit
RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c chmod +x /opt/purple-team/scripts/entrypoint-base.sh # buildkit
RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c mkdir -p /opt/purple-team/scripts /etc/rsyslog.d # buildkit

RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c useradd -m -s /bin/bash dev-user &&     echo "dev-user:<REDACTED-SCENARIO-FIXTURE>" | chpasswd &&     usermod -aG wheel dev-user &&     echo "dev-user ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL" > /etc/sudoers.d/dev-user &&     chmod 440 /etc/sudoers.d/dev-user # buildkit

RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c mkdir -p /home/labadmin/.ssh &&     chmod 700 /home/labadmin/.ssh &&     chown -R labadmin:labadmin /home/labadmin/.ssh # buildkit

RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c useradd -m -s /bin/bash labadmin &&     usermod -aG wheel labadmin &&     echo "labadmin ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL" > /etc/sudoers.d/labadmin &&     chmod 440 /etc/sudoers.d/labadmin # buildkit

RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c mkdir /var/run/sshd &&     ssh-keygen -A &&     sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config &&     sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication.*/PasswordAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config &&     sed -i 's/#PubkeyAuthentication.*/PubkeyAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config # buildkit

RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c systemctl enable rsyslog sshd systemd-user-sessions &&     systemctl enable systemd-user-sessions.service &&     ln -sf /usr/lib/systemd/system/systemd-user-sessions.service /etc/systemd/system/multi-user.target.wants/ # buildkit
RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c systemctl set-default multi-user.target # buildkit

RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c (cd /lib/systemd/system/sysinit.target.wants/; for i in *; do [ $i == systemd-tmpfiles-setup.service ] || rm -f $i; done);     rm -f /lib/systemd/system/multi-user.target.wants/*;    rm -f /etc/systemd/system/*.wants/*;    rm -f /lib/systemd/system/local-fs.target.wants/*;     rm -f /lib/systemd/system/sockets.target.wants/*udev*;     rm -f /lib/systemd/system/sockets.target.wants/*initctl*;     rm -f /lib/systemd/system/basic.target.wants/*;    rm -f /lib/systemd/system/anaconda.target.wants/*; # buildkit

RUN |3 INSTALL_WAZUH=true INSTALL_FALCO=true INSTALL_XSIAM=false /bin/sh -c dnf install -y epel-release &&     dnf update -y &&     dnf install -y     rsyslog     openssh-server     sudo     systemd     systemd-sysv     iproute     iproute-tc     hostname     procps-ng     openssh-clients     net-tools     gnupg     git     postgresql     && dnf clean all # buildkit
